title: crotalaria abscondita
intro: Crotalaria abscondita, also known as a type of legume or pea-flower plant, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a natural anthelmintic, which helps in the treatment of parasitic worm infections. The health benefits of Crotalaria abscondita include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and other respiratory issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves are sometimes used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
